name: Peanut Butter Pie (Gene Autry's)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together peanut butter, cream cheese and sugar.
2. Stir in the melted butter, whipping cream, and vanilla.
3. Mix well.
4. Pour into graham cracker crust.
5. Chill 4 to 5 hours or until well set.
6. Top with heated, thinned hot fudge sauce.
7. Chill again for 30 minutes.
